design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Navigating the sci-fi world of Total Recall as an action platformer protagonist
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Described as 'a pretty terrible adaptation of the 1990 sci-fi movie,' suggesting poor design choices in translating film source material to interactive form

danger_signals: Cars at level 1 that speed across screen and shoot bullets

sources_used: tcrf - Total Recall (NES) - The Cutting Room Floor
data_quality_notes: T3 tier data: source provides only development/production trivia (unused music, sprite rendering) and critical assessment. No documented gameplay mechanics, difficulty details, progression structure, or boss design philosophy available in source material.
